justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternative days but did not proactively suggest alternative times within the same day until explicitly prompted by the user.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple check_availability calls for specific times on consecutive days, which could have been more efficiently handled by checking broader availability for each day.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times on the same day made the conversation feel a bit drawn out and less efficient from the customer's perspective.
